password.title: Password Generator - Free Secure Random Password
password.description: Generate cryptographically secure, random passwords instantly. Free online password generator with customizable length and character options.

ascii.title: ASCII Table - Full Character Reference
ascii.description: Complete ASCII character table with hex, octal, HTML, and decimal codes. Free online ASCII reference for developers.

htmlcode.title: HTML Entity Encoder/Decoder
htmlcode.description: Encode and decode HTML special characters and entities. Free online HTML code converter for web developers.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder/Decoder - Free Online Tool
base64.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings online. Free Base64 encoder/decoder with Basic Authentication header support. 100% client-side.

hashing.title: Hash Generator - MD5, SHA-256, SHA-512 Online
hashing.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA3, and RIPEMD-160 hashes. Free online hash generator, 100% browser-based.

checksum.title: File Checksum Calculator - Free Online
checksum.description: Calculate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 checksums for any file. Supports unlimited file size, 100% client-side processing.

cipher.title: Text Encrypt/Decrypt - AES, DES, RC4 Online
cipher.description: Encrypt and decrypt text using AES, DES, Triple DES, Rabbit, RC4, and RC4Drop. Free online cipher tool, 100% browser-based.

storageunit.title: Storage Unit Converter - Bytes to TB
storageunit.description: Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB and more. Free online storage unit converter for developers.

uuid.title: UUID Generator - RFC 4122/9562 Online
uuid.description: Generate v1/v3/v4/v5/v7 UUIDs in your browser. Free, fully local, no tracking.

urlencoder.title: URL Encoder/Decoder - Free Online Tool
urlencoder.description: Encode and decode URL strings with Component, Whole URL, and Form modes. Free online URL encoder/decoder, 100% client-side.

diff.title: Text Diff Comparison - Free Online Tool
diff.description: Compare two texts or code snippets with line and word-level precision. Side-by-side or inline view, 100% client-side.

markdown.title: Markdown Editor & Preview - Free Online Tool
markdown.description: Write and preview Markdown with GitHub Flavored Markdown support. Free online Markdown editor with live preview, 100% client-side.

json.title: JSON Formatter / Compressor - Free Online Tool
json.description: Format, compress, and validate JSON online. Pretty-print with configurable indentation, minify to single line, or parse JSON5. 100% client-side.

dbviewer.title: SQLite DB Viewer - Browse and Query .db Files Online
dbviewer.description: Open SQLite databases in your browser, browse schema, run read-only SQL with autocomplete, paginate large result sets, and export to CSV or JSON. 100% client-side.

jwt.title: JWT Debugger - JSON Web Token Encoder & Decoder
jwt.description: Encode, decode, and verify JSON Web Tokens (JWT). Supports HS256, RS256, ES256 and more. 100% client-side.

unixtime.title: Unix Timestamp Converter — Seconds, Milliseconds, UTC
unixtime.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Supports seconds and milliseconds, shows Local and UTC side-by-side, with a live clock. 100% client-side.

cron.title: Cron Expression Generator & Parser
cron.description: Build and decode Cron expressions for Standard, Spring, and Quartz schedulers. See human-readable explanations and the next 5 execution times.
